nodes.label: Scroll Area Message Provenance Invariant
nodes.rationale: Every string reaching the HI scroll area must originate from narr.asm tables (faery.toml [narr]) or hardcoded literals from dialog_system.md. No new player-facing prose may be invented in Rust code — this is a fidelity invariant enforced by R-INTRO-012/013/014.

nodes.label: Fabricated Food System / FOOD_SATIATION Bug
nodes.rationale: The invented 6-slot food system (FOOD_SATIATION + BuyItem(n) → eat slot 22+n) corrupted quest items; slot 22 is the Talisman win condition. Removed and replaced with a no-op stub pending Plan M.

nodes.label: Facing-Dependent Weapon Draw Order (behind vs on top)
nodes.rationale: Weapon must be drawn behind the body for some facings and on top for others; general case: behind when (facing-2)&4!=0; bow walking: behind when (facing&4)==0. This mirrors the original resolve_pass_params (fmain.c:2400-2409).
